title: 2pcs. 2 Gang Surface Mount Back Box Pattress Box, 145mm x 86mm x 25mm, White
features: Versatile: 2 gang surface mount back box suitable for mounting electrical accessories on walls or ceilings.
Dimensions: 145mm x 86mm x 25mm, providing ample space for wiring and connections.
Durable Construction: Made from sturdy white plastic for long-lasting use.
Easy Installation: Surface mount design allows for straightforward installation without need for recessed cutting.
Multipurpose: Compatible with a variety of electrical fittings, such as switches, sockets, and more.
description: This 2 Gang Surface Mount Back Box Pattress Box is an essential component for installing electrical accessories such as light switches, power sockets, and other wiring devices. Measuring 145mm x 86mm x 25mm (approximately 5.7 inches x 3.4 inches x 1 inch), this white plastic box is designed for surface mounting on walls or ceilings. Its sturdy construction ensures a secure and reliable installation, while the spacious interior provides ample room for wiring and connections. Whether you're undertaking a new electrical project or upgrading an existing installation, this back box offers a convenient and practical solution. Its versatile design allows for easy access and maintenance, making it a valuable addition to any electrician's toolkit or DIY enthusiast's arsenal.
